summary: Kang Hyunwoo attends a social gathering with old acquaintances who are unaware of his true circumstances. While his peers initially pity him under the false assumption that his family went bankrupt and he is destitute, Hyunwoo reveals that he has already cleared his debts and is doing well. The gathering takes an tense turn when an antagonist plans to humiliate Hyunwoo by mocking his financial status, unaware that Hyunwoo is prepared for the confrontation.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo arrives at a reunion and reunites with his old friends and acquaintances.
The group discusses Hyunwoo's supposed bankruptcy, with some offering pity while others judge his situation.
Hyunwoo clarifies that he has already paid off all his debts and reveals his current success, leading to a shift in the group's attitude and an antagonist plotting his downfall.
